violations.text: Yogurt and fruit parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the back preparation rooms. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2025
The floor in the prep/service area is in poor repair. Floor tiles were observed cracked or missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
The establishment is lacking an allergen statement on menu board. PIC will add allergen statement to menu. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back storage room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was disposed of during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Fried eggs, which were prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Eggs are cooked in advance and reheated upon customer request. Eggs were with-n the 6-hour cooling time, eggs put onto a sheet pan to fully cool. Cooling methods were reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in back storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The cutting boards on the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2024
The ice machine in the back room was observed to have an air break instead of an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2024

The floor in the prep/service area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated that they are in the process of replacing flooring New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
